description: The main objective of this pipeline is to annotate data with table values and merge annotations. The pipeline starts with a node that annotates data and ends with another node that merges annotations.

193a4a33-4294-46c3-8567-157684633fe8.name: annotate-data-with-table-values
193a4a33-4294-46c3-8567-157684633fe8.description:
Annotates the incoming data with values from the input table

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.

30041eea-d209-49c4-b866-567eff783485.name: annotation-merge
30041eea-d209-49c4-b866-567eff783485.description:
Merges the annotations of all incoming data and outputs the same data with those merged annotations.

This algorithm groups the incoming data based on the annotations. Those groups can consist of one data item per slot.
